content.en:
this day.

Ye Tian obtained a piece of information from a peak realm god of the supreme force of the Two Realms Gate, and of course he also paid an extradimensional resource for this information.

This piece of information is about the transaction of the Garanbao ship.

It can be said that only the supreme forces know about this matter, of course, the peak realm gods among the few top forces also know about it, but they are not qualified to enter the Jialan Treasure Ship, because if you want to enter the Jialan Treasure Ship, you must have a certain net worth, and if you are too poor to be a peak realm god, you will naturally not be able to enter.

"The Jialan Treasure Ship deal, no wonder Taihao Tianchao Palace will let those high-level realm gods enter the super dimensional treasure land, and even secretly want to acquire the resources of those high-level realm gods, but they just don't agree. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Obviously, Taihao Tianchao Palace also wants to use these resources to enter the Jialan Treasure Ship and trade a lot of good things.

According to the information Ye Tian obtained from the Two Realms Gate, the Galan Treasure Ship was a Hyperdimensional Treasure Ship that came here every other extradimensional era, but it had come a little more frequently recently.

Once the Garanbao ship arrives, any realm god can board the ship and trade as long as he has enough money.

Whether it is the gods of the realm or those demon seeds, the Garanbao ship will not refuse.

Of course, if the demons choose to enter the Garanbo ship, they must restrain their breath and not affect the creatures on the Garanbo ship, otherwise the consequences will be very serious.

It is rumored that the Garanbao ship came from a very distant Death Void region, and crossed countless dangers before coming here.

And where the Garanbao ship came, the supreme forces couldn't go, and there were too many dangers for them to deal with.

There were also supreme forces that followed the Garanbao ship, but not only could not keep up with the speed, but also encountered all kinds of dangers on the way, and almost wiped out the whole army.

Since then, no supreme force has dared to follow the Garanbao ship away.

And the reason why the Garan Treasure Ship can survive countless dangers is not only that the Garan Treasure Ship is an incomparably powerful superdimensional secret technique, but more importantly, there is a transcendent realm above the peak realm god on the Garan Treasure Ship.

It is precisely because of the existence of this extradimensional realm that he can ignore most of the dangers of the Death Void.

But even so, the Garanbao ship also has a specific route, and it does not dare to walk in the void of death.

Obviously, the extradimensional realm is not really safe in the Death Void either.

However, there was no doubt that without the cultivation of the extradimensional realm, there would not be much distance to explore in the Death Void, and he could only shrink into a small area.

And in small places like the Eternal Realm, the Realm God Realm, and the Demon Seed Abyss, I don't know how many Death Voids there are, and the Garlan Treasure Ship is to enter these areas, trade with the indigenous realm gods in these areas, and obtain various resources.

In this way, there is no need to take risks, and you can make a lot of money in every transaction.

"The Garanbo Ship'!"

Ye Tian is very interested in this transaction, maybe in this transaction, he can see a lot, and he can also trade more good things and even inheritance, so that he will not be ignorant and understand cultivation.

So, he had to take advantage of this deal.

Of course.

He must gather enough resources, otherwise he is not qualified to trade!

"However, once I go to trade, it will inevitably reveal that I have a lot of extradimensional resources. Even, Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace might suspect that I had taken the resources in the Transcendent Treasure Land. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, as long as he builds up his strength quickly, he ignores this danger.

Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace is only in the middle ranks among the supreme forces, as long as his strength is improved again, he may not be afraid of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace.

Moreover, Taihao Tianzhu Palace has no evidence, and it will not necessarily offend him.

If he traded a powerful life-saving thing on the Jialanbao ship, he didn't have to be afraid of the Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace.

......

"There are still about 20 billion Dao Era years left, so let's explore the Death Void frantically!"

He wasn't going to sacrifice his replica body to frantically explore the Void of Death, but now he had to do so.

So, in the following days, Ye Tian's replica body began to explore the Void of Death from all directions.

Of course.

The distance he explored was relatively far away, so as to prevent encountering the pinnacle realm gods of other supreme forces.

It's a pity that he can't copy the body of an extradimensional creature, otherwise it would be much easier. []

And the Death Void, there are no other living beings except extradimensional creatures.

Therefore, he can only rely on his own copy of the body to explore.

Due to the fact that there were too many dangerous places in the Death Void, his replica body fell again and again.

You must know that his copied body is already comparable to a peak realm god, and it is a very powerful peak realm god, but in this case, they have fallen again and again.

Fortunately, none of the replica bodies he fused with extradimensional things have fallen, and he rarely uses such replica bodies to explore, and only when he encounters extradimensional creatures that are not weak, but will not surpass himself, he will use such a replica body.

The years passed.

Ye Tian obtained more and more resources from the Death Void, but there were also a lot of fallen copy bodies.

If each copy body was replaced with a peak realm god, no supreme force could afford such a loss, and even if it couldn't make up so many peak realm gods, only Ye Tiancai could afford such a loss.

Time flies.

More than 10 billion solstices have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already collected a large number of extradimensional resources, and secretly cultivated a large number of high-level realm gods with a few resources, but he did not let these high-level realm gods go out to wander, and they all hid in the depths of the human race temple and practiced there.

Meanwhile.

His wife and children also used a large amount of resources to refine the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit again, preparing to condense the ninth Eternal Realm Spirit, (Zhao Wang Zhao) Once the breakthrough is successful, the cultivation will be the same as Ye Tian.

But Ye Tian has not yet been promoted to the limit of a high-level realm god, and his Eternal Dao Seed is still far from being raised to the limit, and it is estimated that there will still be two tens of billions of Dao Era years before he can raise the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit.

Soon after.

Ye Tian's wives and children broke through one after another, and their cultivation had all reached the high-level peak realm god level.

Before you know it, the day of the arrival of the Garanbao ship is getting closer and closer.

At this time, the pinnacle realm gods didn't go to the Death Void to explore, in case they encountered danger during this period, or were trapped somewhere and couldn't get out, wouldn't they miss the Ghalan Treasure Ship deal?

So, they waited quietly for the arrival of the Garanbao ship.

Only Ye Tian was still exploring the Death Void, and he had explored far away, and the harvest was naturally quite a lot.

this day.

The Galanbo ship has officially arrived.
